title: Dependency Dashboard
body:
This issue provides visibility into Renovate updates and their statuses. [Learn more](https://docs.renovatebot.com/key-concepts/dashboard/)

## Awaiting Schedule

These updates are awaiting their schedule. Click on a checkbox to get an update now.
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/eslint-config-algolia-19.x -->chore(deps): update dependency eslint-config-algolia to v19
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/eslint-plugin-prettier-4.x -->chore(deps): update dependency eslint-plugin-prettier to v4
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/jest-environment-jsdom-global-3.x -->chore(deps): update dependency jest-environment-jsdom-global to v3
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/rollup-plugin-filesize-9.x -->chore(deps): update dependency rollup-plugin-filesize to v9

 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/semver-7.x -->chore(deps): update dependency semver to v7
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/webpack-5.x -->chore(deps): update dependency webpack to v5
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/circleci-node-13.x -->chore(deps): update node.js to v13
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/circleci-node-14.x -->chore(deps): update node.js to v14

 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/circleci-node-16.x -->chore(deps): update node.js to v16
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/major-6-storybook-monorepo -->chore(deps): update storybook monorepo to v6 (major) (`@storybook/addon-actions`, `@storybook/html`, `@storybook/theming`)
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/major-6-webdriverio-monorepo -->chore(deps): update webdriverio monorepo (major) (`@wdio/cli`, `@wdio/jasmine-framework`, `@wdio/junit-reporter`, `@wdio/local-runner`, `@wdio/sauce-service`, `@wdio/selenium-standalone-service`, `@wdio/spec-reporter`, `@wdio/static-server-service`)
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/major-7-webdriverio-monorepo -->chore(deps): update webdriverio monorepo (major) (`@wdio/cli`, `@wdio/jasmine-framework`, `@wdio/junit-reporter`, `@wdio/local-runner`, `@wdio/sauce-service`, `@wdio/selenium-standalone-service`, `@wdio/spec-reporter`, `@wdio/static-server-service`)
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/events-2.x -->fix(deps): update dependency events to v2
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/events-3.x -->fix(deps): update dependency events to v3
 - [ ] <!-- unschedule-branch=renovate/lock-file-maintenance -->chore(deps): lock file maintenance
